Wild Corvids.Description: Allows random corvids to spawn in the overworld.

Egg Accessibility Mode.Description: Adds bright borders around eggs, making them a bit easier to find!

Vanilla Crow Retexture.Description: Replaces vanilla crow textures with ones in this mod's style.

Exclude Items From Perfection.Description: Excludes items from perfection. Golden items are always excluded regardless of this toggle.

Dungeon Audio Changes.Description: Replaces monster sound effects with crow caws when in The Murder Below dungeon. Disable if you experience a significant lag spike when entering/exiting the dungeon. Hardware dependant.
